name: Easy Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 2 cups OIL FOR DEEP FAT FRYING
recipeInstructions:
1. BLEND TOGETHER SUGAR, MILK, EGGS, and OIL.
2. ADD FLOUR, SALT, and BAKING POWDER. MIX LIGHTLY.
3. HEAT 2 CUPS OIL in a 2 QUART SAUCE PAN to 365°F.
4. DROP DOUGH by TEASPOONFUL into HOT oil.
5. FRY for 2 TO 3 MINUTES or until GOLDEN BROWN.
6. TURN OFTEN while cooking.
7. DRAIN on PAPER TOWELING and ROLL in WHITE SUGAR while still HOT.
8. HINT: CHECK THE FIRST COUPLE OF DOUGHNUTS to see if they are OKAY and DONE.
